[財務資料的探索性資料分析專案.ipynb](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27298933/default.ipynb)
# project{"nbformat":4,"nbformat_minor":5,"metadata":{"kernelspec":{"display_name":"Python 3","language":"python","name":"python3"},"language_info":{"name":"python","version":"3.10.12"},"colab":{"provenance":[],"toc_visible":true}},"cells":[{"cell_type":"markdown","metadata":{"id":"OuB2BXcIOtGe"},"source":["# Exploratory Data Analysis for Financial Data\n","# 財務資料的探索性資料分析\n","---\n","\n","> *\"We would like to get an overview of our recent sales. We need someone who can objectively examine the data and provide sound insights..\"*\n",">\n","> *「我們想了解近期銷售概況。我們需要一個能客觀檢視並利用這份資料提出合理見解的人。」*\n","\n","## 🎬 Story Background 故事背景\n","\n","We need to wrap our heads around these recent sales. I’m looking for someone to take an objective look at this and provide a logical interpretation of what’s actually going on:\n","\n","我們需要搞清楚最近的銷售狀況。我正在找一個能客觀審視的人，針對現況給出合理的解讀。：\n","\n","> *\"We need someone who can look at this data objectively. Can you run a full exploratory analysis? Look for anomalies, outliers, anything that doesn't fit the pattern.\"*\n",">\n","> *「我們需要一個能客觀檢視資料的人。你能做一次完整的探索性分析嗎？找出異常值、離群值，任何不符合模式的東西。」*\n","\n","This isn't just data anymore — it's evidence. Handle with care.\n","\n","這已經不只是資料了——這是證據。請謹慎處理。\n","---"],"id":"OuB2BXcIOtGe"},{"cell_type":"markdown","metadata":{"id":"-F80m_w9OtGg"},"source":["---\n","## Part 1: Environment Setup 'block' : 'none';\n","\n","      async function convertToInteractive(key) {\n","        const element = document.querySelector('#df-b4e30110-ade7-4398-acab-1d473ca28748');\n","        const dataTable =\n","          await google.colab.kernel.invokeFunction('convertToInteractive',\n","                                                    [key], {});\n","        if (!dataTable) return;\n","\n","        const docLinkHtml = 'Like what you see? tables.';\n","        element.innerHTML = '';\n","        dataTable['output_type'] = 'display_data';\n","        await google.colab.output.renderOutput(dataTable, element);\n","        const docLink = document.createElement('div');\n","        docLink.innerHTML = docLinkHtml;\n","        element.appendChild(docLink);\n","      }\n","    </script>\n","  </div>\n","\n","\n","    </div>\n"," \"Country\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"category\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 1,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"United States\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": 99301.0,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 626,\n        \"samples\": [\n          56301.0\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"Region\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"category\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 4,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"West\"\n        ],\n \"num_unique_values\": 17,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"Bookcases\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"Product Name\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"category\",\n        \"num_unique_values\": 1849,\n        \"samples\": [\n          \"Imation\\u00a032GB Pocket Pro USB 3.0\\u00a0Flash Drive\\u00a0- 32 GB - Black - 1 P ...\"\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"column\": \"Sales\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"dtype\": \"number\",\n        \"std\": 626.6518748388047,\n        \"min\": 0.444,\n        \"max\": 22638.48,\n        \"num_unique_values\": 5757,\n        \"samples\": [\n          35.34\n        ],\n        \"semantic_type\": \"\",\n        \"description\": \"\"\n      }\n    }\n  ]\n}"}},"metadata":{},"execution_count":4}],"source":["import kagglehub\n","path = kagglehub.dataset_download('rohitsahoo/sales-forecasting')\n","df = pd.read_csv(f'{path}/train.csv')\n","print(f'Dataset loaded: {df.shape[0]:,} rows x {df.shape[1]} columns')\n","print(f'Columns: {list(df.columns)}')\n","df.head()"],"execution_count":null,"id":"DKh5f5bVOtGh"},{"cell_type":"markdown","metadata":{"id":"6c-p5agnOtGh"},"source":["---\n","## Part 2:\n","---"],"id":"6c-p5agnOtGh"},{"cell_type":"markdown","metadata":{"id":"YYFj6X_LOtGh"},"source":["---\n","\n","### 🔍 Mission 1 任務 1: First Pass — Examine the Raw Data 第一輪檢查 — 檢視原始資料\n","\n","**Level 級別**: Basic 基礎\n","\n","> *Before jumping to conclusions, you need to understand the baseline. What do the numbers normally look like? Is the sales distribution the way you'd expect? Start with the fundamentals — mean, median, spread, skewness.*\n",">\n","> *在下結論之前，你需要了解基準線。正常的數字長什麼樣？銷售額的分佈是否符合預期？從基本面開始——平均數、中位數、分散程度、偏態。*"],"id":"YYFj6X_LOtGh"},{"cell_type":"markdown","metadata":{"id":"JK2IqkrSOtGh"},"source":["**Task 任務：**\n","\n","1. Calculate mean, median, std for `Sales`; also show the count of orders per `Segment`\n","   計算 Sales 的平均、中位數、標準差；並顯示各 Segment 的訂單數量\n","2. Calculate skewness and kurtosis for Sales\n","   計算 Sales 的偏態和峰態\n","3. Is Sales positively or negatively skewed? What does this mean?\n","   Sales 是正偏還是負偏？這代表什麼？\n","4. Create a histogram of Sales with mean and median lines\n","   建立 Sales 的直方圖，標示平均和中位數"],"id":"JK2IqkrSOtGh"},{"cell_type":"markdown","metadata":{"id":"eln9cT0gOtGh"},"source":["---\n","\n","### 🤖 AI Prompt\n","\n","```\n","Write prompt here... ✍️\n","在此撰寫提示詞...\n","我目前在 Google Colab 使用 Python 進行資料分析，資料已經讀入為一個 pandas DataFrame，名稱為 df，內容是銷售訂單資料。\n","\n","目前可以使用的套件包含 pandas、numpy、matplotlib、seaborn 以及 scipy。\n","\n","請幫我完成以下資料分析任務（EDA）：\n","\n","1. 針對「Sales」欄位進行統計分析，請計算：\n","   - 平均數（mean）\n","   - 中位數（median）\n","   - 標準差（standard deviation）\n","   （可使用 .mean(), .median(), .std()）\n","\n","2. 計算「Sales」的偏態（skewness）與峰態（kurtosis），請使用 scipy.stats.skew() 與 scipy.stats.kurtosis()。\n","\n","3. 根據偏態結果，判斷 Sales 是正偏還是負偏，並簡單說明其代表的意義。\n","\n","4. 針對類別欄位進行分析：\n","   - 計算「Segment」的訂單數量（value_counts）\n","   - （可額外觀察 Category 分布）\n","   （可使用 .value_counts()）\n","\n","5. 視覺化分析：\n","   - 繪製 Sales 的直方圖（histogram）\n","   - 在圖中標示平均數與中位數（使用垂直線表示）\n","\n","6. 程式碼撰寫要求：\n","   - 使用 pandas、matplotlib 與 scipy\n","   - 加上中英文雙語註解（bilingual comments）\n","   - 輸出結果需有清楚的格式（適當使用 print 說明）\n","   - 圖表請使用 plt.tight_layout() 讓版面整齊\n","\n","---"],"id":"eln9cT0gOtGh"},{"cell_type":"code","metadata":{"id":"7sRV5IlKOtGh","colab":{"base_uri":"https://localhost:8080/","height":950},"executionInfo":{"status":"ok","timestamp":1774617060702,"user_tz":-480,"elapsed":628,"user":{"displayName":"江磊","userId":"08193413321773822553"}},"outputId":"97c6e08e-35d5-4a74-9940-724c8249b30f"},"outputs":[{"output_type":"stream","name":"stdout","text":["--- 1. 基本統計資訊 (Basic Statistics) ---\n","平均數 (Mean): 230.77\n","中位數 (Median): 54.49\n","標準差 (Standard Deviation): 626.65\n","\n","--- 2. 分布特性 (Distribution Properties) ---\n","偏態 (Skewness): 12.98\n","峰態 (Kurtosis): 304.29\n","\n","--- 3. 偏態解讀 (Skewness Interpretation) ---\n","結果：正偏 (Positive Skew / Right-skewed)\n","意義：資料的右側尾部較長，大部分的銷售額集中在較低數值，少數高額訂單拉高了平均值。\n","\n","--- 4. 類別分布 (Categorical Distribution) ---\n","客戶細分 (Segment) 訂單量:\n","Segment\n","Consumer       5101\n","Corporate      2953\n","Home Office    1746\n","Name: count, dtype: int64\n","\n","產品類別 (Category) 訂單量:\n","Category\n","Office Supplies    5909\n","Furniture          2078\n","Technology         1813\n","Name: count, dtype: int64\n","\n"]},{"output_type":"display_data","data":{"text/plain":["<Figure size 1200x600 with 1 Axes>"],"image/png":"\n"},"metadata":{}}],"source":["import pandas as pd\n","import numpy as np\n","import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n","import seaborn as sns\n","from scipy.stats import skew, kurtosis\n","\n","# 1. Sales 欄位統計分析 / Statistical analysis for 'Sales'\n","sales_mean = df['Sales'].mean()\n","sales_median = df['Sales'].median()\n","sales_std = df['Sales'].std()\n","\n","print(\"--- 1. 基本統計資訊 (Basic Statistics) ---\")\n","print(f\"平均數 (Mean): {sales_mean:.2f}\")\n","print(f\"中位數 (Median): {sales_median:.2f}\")\n","print(f\"標準差 (Standard Deviation): {sales_std:.2f}\\n\")\n","\n","# 2. 計算偏態與峰態 / Calculate Skewness and Kurtosis\n","sales_skew = skew(df['Sales'].dropna())\n","sales_kurt = kurtosis(df['Sales'].dropna())\n","\n","print(\"--- 2. 分布特性 (Distribution Properties) ---\")\n","print(f\"偏態 (Skewness): {sales_skew:.2f}\")\n","print(f\"峰態 (Kurtosis): {sales_kurt:.2f}\\n\")\n","\n","# 3. 判斷偏態意義 / Interpret Skewness\n","print(\"--- 3. 偏態解讀 (Skewness Interpretation) ---\")\n","if sales_skew > 0:\n","    print(\"結果：正偏 (Positive Skew / Right-skewed)\")\n","    print(\"意義：資料的右側尾部較長，大部分的銷售額集中在較低數值，少數高額訂單拉高了平均值。\")\n","elif sales_skew < 0:\n","    print(\"結果：負偏 (Negative Skew / Left-skewed)\")\n","    print(\"意義：資料的左側尾部較長，大部分的銷售額集中在較高數值。\")\n","else:\n","    print(\"結果：常態分佈 (Symmetrical Distribution)\")\n","print(\"\")\n","\n","# 4. 類別欄位分析 / Categorical Column Analysis\n","print(\"--- 4. 類別分布 (Categorical Distribution) ---\")\n","segment_counts = df['Segment'].value_counts()\n","category_counts = df['Category'].value_counts()\n","\n","print(\"客戶細分 (Segment) 訂單量:\")\n","print(segment_counts)\n","print(\"\\n產品類別 (Category) 訂單量:\")\n","print(category_counts)\n","print(\"\")\n","\n","# 5. 視覺化分析 - 優化 X 軸刻度 / Visual Analysis - Optimized X-axis\n","plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))\n","\n","# 繪製直方圖 (Histogram)\n","sns.histplot(df['Sales'], kde=True, color='skyblue', bins=100) # 增加 bins 讓分組更細緻\n","\n","# 標示平均數與中位數 (Mark Mean and Median)\n","plt.axvline(sales_mean, color='red', linestyle='--', linewidth=2, label=f'Mean: {sales_mean:.2f}')\n","plt.axvline(sales_median, color='green', linestyle='-', linewidth=2, label=f'Median: {sales_median:.2f}')\n","\n","# --- 重點：調整 X 軸刻度與範圍 ---\n","# 這裡設定刻度間距為 200 (Step = 200)\n","# 同時限制顯示範圍在 0 到 3000 之間（因為大部分資料都在這），避免長尾導致圖表太扁\n","max_range = 3000\n","plt.xticks(np.arange(0, max_range + 1, 200), rotation=45) # 每 200 一個刻度，並旋轉 45 度避免重疊\n","plt.xlim(0, max_range) # 限制 X 軸範圍，讓主體資料更清晰\n","\n","# 設定圖表標題與標籤 (Set title and labels)\n","plt.title('Distribution of Sales (Zoomed in with 200-unit intervals)', fontsize=15)\n","plt.xlabel('Sales Amount')\n","plt.ylabel('Frequency')\n","plt.legend()\n","\n","# 調整版面並顯示 (Tight layout)\n","plt.tight_layout()\n","plt.show()"],"execution_count":null,"id":"7sRV5IlKOtGh"},{"cell_type":"markdown","metadata":{"id":"WLbU4kr9OtGi"},"source":["---\n","\n","### 🔎 Mission 2 任務 2: Deep Dive — Hunting for Outliers 深入調查 — 追蹤異常值\n","\n","**Level 級別**: Intermediate 中階\n","\n","> *The descriptive stats revealed some interesting patterns. Now it's time to get surgical — use IQR to identify exactly which data points fall outside normal bounds. These outliers could be errors, fraud, or legitimate big deals. Your job is to find them.*\n",">\n","> *描述統計揭示了一些有趣的模式。現在該精準出擊了——使用 IQR 精確找出哪些資料點超出正常範圍。這些異常值可能是錯誤、舞弊，或是正常的大筆交易。你的工作是把它們找出來。*"],"id":"WLbU4kr9OtGi"},{"cell_type":"markdown","metadata":{"id":"LrZlcmf6OtGi"},"source":["**Task 任務：**\n","\n","1. Calculate Q1, Q3, IQR for `Sales` column\n","   計算 Sales 的 Q1, Q3, IQR\n","2. Define outlier bounds: lower = Q1 - 1.5*IQR, upper = Q3 + 1.5*IQR\n","   定義異常值邊界\n","3. Count and display outliers\n","   計算並顯示異常值\n","4. Create a boxplot of `Sales` by `Category`\n","   建立各類別 Sales 的箱形圖"],"id":"LrZlcmf6OtGi"},{"cell_type":"markdown","metadata":{"id":"uunwpsDyOtGi"},"source":["---\n","\n","### 🤖 AI Prompt\n","\n","```\n","Write prompt here... ✍️\n","在此撰寫提示詞...\n","我目前有一個 pandas DataFrame 名稱為 df，包含銷售資料。目前可以使用的套件包含 pandas、numpy、matplotlib、seaborn 以及 scipy。\n","請幫我撰寫一段 Python 程式碼完成以下任務：\n","\n","1. 統計分析 (IQR Method)：計算 Sales 欄位的 Q1、Q3 與四分位距 (IQR)。\n","\n","2. 根據 1.5×IQR 法則定義異常值的上下界 (Lower/Upper Bound)。\n","\n","3. 篩選出異常值，並輸出異常值的總數量、佔比以及前 5 筆範例資料。\n","\n","4. 進階視覺化 (Boxplot)：\n","\n","使用 seaborn 依照 Category 欄位繪製 Sales 的箱形圖。\n","\n","關鍵要求：由於資料分佈極不平均，請將 Y 軸設定為對數尺度 (log scale) 以利觀察箱體細節，並加上清楚的中英文雙語圖表標題與座標軸標籤。\n","\n","程式碼規範：\n","\n","必須包含 中英文雙語註解 (Bilingual comments)。\n","\n","輸出結果 (print) 需有清楚的分段說明。\n","\n","最後使用 plt.tight_layout() 確保版面整齊。\n","\n","---"],"id":"uunwpsDyOtGi"},{"cell_type":"code","metadata":{"id":"pZJrvldWOtGi","colab":{"base_uri":"https://localhost:8080/","height":908},"executionInfo":{"status":"ok","timestamp":1774617043703,"user_tz":-480,"elapsed":3282,"user":{"displayName":"江磊","userId":"08193413321773822553"}},"outputId":"4feb3a74-5b67-411b-992b-841a9134d8ec"},"outputs":[{"output_type":"stream","name":"stdout","text":["--- 1. 四分位數資訊 (Quartile Information) ---\n","第一四分位數 (Q1): 17.25\n","第三四分位數 (Q3): 210.61\n","四分位距 (IQR): 193.36\n","\n","--- 2. 異常值判定標準 (Outlier Thresholds) ---\n","下界 (Lower Bound): -272.79\n","上界 (Upper Bound): 500.64\n","\n","--- 3. 異常值統計 (Outlier Statistics) ---\n","異常值總數 (Total Outliers): 1145\n","異常值佔比 (Percentage): 11.68%\n","\n","前 5 筆異常值資料範例 (Top 5 Outliers Example):\n","      Category      Sales\n","1    Furniture   731.9400\n","3    Furniture   957.5775\n","7   Technology   907.1520\n","10   Furniture  1706.1840\n","11  Technology   911.4240\n","\n"]},{"output_type":"display_data","data":{"text/plain":["<Figure size 1200x700 with 1 Axes>"],"image/png":"\n"},"metadata":{}}],"source":["import pandas as pd\n","import numpy as np\n","import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n","import seaborn as sns\n","# --- 1. 計算四分位數與 IQR / Calculate Quartiles and Interquartile Range (IQR) ---\n","\n","# 計算第一四分位數 (25%) / Compute the First Quartile (25th percentile)\n","Q1 = df['Sales'].quantile(0.25)\n","\n","# 計算第三四分位數 (75%) / Compute the Third Quartile (75th percentile)\n","Q3 = df['Sales'].quantile(0.75)\n","\n","# 計算四分位距 / Calculate the Interquartile Range (IQR)\n","IQR = Q3 - Q1\n","\n","print(\"--- 1. 四分位數資訊 (Quartile Information) ---\")\n","print(f\"第一四分位數 (Q1): {Q1:.2f}\")\n","print(f\"第三四分位數 (Q3): {Q3:.2f}\")\n","print(f\"四分位距 (IQR): {IQR:.2f}\\n\")\n","\n","\n","# --- 2. 定義異常值邊界 / Define Outlier Bounds using 1.5*IQR Rule ---\n","\n","# 計算異常值判定的下界 / Calculate Lower Bound for outliers\n","lower_bound = Q1 - 1.5 * IQR\n","\n","# 計算異常值判定的上界 / Calculate Upper Bound for outliers\n","upper_bound = Q3 + 1.5 * IQR\n","\n","print(\"--- 2. 異常值判定標準 (Outlier Thresholds) ---\")\n","print(f\"下界 (Lower Bound): {lower_bound:.2f}\")\n","print(f\"上界 (Upper Bound): {upper_bound:.2f}\\n\")\n","\n","\n","# --- 3. 找出異常值並統計 / Identify and Summarize Outliers ---\n","\n","# 篩選超出上下界的資料 / Filter records that fall outside the bounds\n","outliers = df[(df['Sales'] < lower_bound) | (df['Sales'] > upper_bound)]\n","\n","# 統計異常值總數量 / Get total number of outliers\n","outlier_count = len(outliers)\n","\n","print(\"--- 3. 異常值統計 (Outlier Statistics) ---\")\n","print(f\"異常值總數 (Total Outliers): {outlier_count}\")\n","# 計算異常值在原始數據中的百分比 / Calculate outlier percentage in original data\n","print(f\"異常值佔比 (Percentage): {(outlier_count / len(df)) * 100:.2f}%\")\n","\n","print(\"\\n前 5 筆異常值資料範例 (Top 5 Outliers Example):\")\n","print(outliers[['Category', 'Sales']].head())\n","print(\"\")\n","\n","\n","# --- 4. 視覺化分析：箱形圖 / Visualization: Boxplot Analysis ---\n","\n","# 初始化畫布大小 / Initialize the figure size\n","plt.figure(figsize=(12, 7))\n","\n","# 繪製各類別的箱形圖，使用專業的 viridis 配色 / Plot boxplot by category with 'viridis' palette\n","sns.boxplot(x='Category', y='Sales', data=df, palette='viridis')\n","\n","# 核心設定：將 Y 軸設為對數尺度以利觀察密集分佈 / Key Step: Set Y-axis to Log Scale to visualize dense data\n","plt.yscale('log')\n","\n","# 設定圖表標題與座標軸名稱 (雙語) / Set chart title and axis labels (Bilingual)\n","plt.title('各產品類別銷售額箱形圖 (Sales Boxplot by Category - Log Scale)', fontsize=15)\n","plt.xlabel('產品類別 (Category)', fontsize=12)\n","plt.ylabel('銷售額 (Sales Amount - Log)', fontsize=12)\n","\n","# 若標籤過長可取消註解進行旋轉 / Uncomment to rotate x-axis labels if necessary\n","# plt.xticks(rotation=0)\n","\n","# 自動調整元件間距，防止重疊 / Adjust layout to prevent overlapping\n","plt.tight_layout()\n","\n","# 顯示圖表 / Display the final plot\n","plt.show()"],"execution_count":null,"id":"pZJrvldWOtGi"},{"cell_type":"markdown","metadata":{"id":"DdnWTChaOtGi"},"source":["---\n","\n","### 📊 Mission 3 任務 3: The Sales department Presentation 銷售部門簡報\n","\n","**Level 級別**: Comprehensive 綜合應用\n","\n","> *The sales department meets tomorrow. They need a full picture of recent performance—a comprehensive EDA dashboard that uncovers sales patterns, anomalies, and actionable business insights. This is your moment to present your analytical expertise clearly and professionally.*\n",">\n","> *銷售部門明天開會。他們需要了解近期銷售概況—例如銷售特性是否具備一定的模式、是否存在異常銷售情形和可行性的業務建議以及完整 EDA 儀表板。這是你清晰且專業地呈現分析能力的時刻。*"],"id":"DdnWTChaOtGi"},{"cell_type":"markdown","metadata":{"id":"H9LaexCpOtGi"},"source":["**Task 任務：**\n","\n","💼 The sales manager asks: \"Show me the full picture of our sales data.\"\n","💼 銷售部經理 問：「讓我看看銷售資料的全貌。」\n","\n","1. Print key metrics: total records, total sales, average sales per order, number of unique customers\n","   印出關鍵指標：總紀錄數、總銷售額、平均每筆訂單銷售額、不重複客戶數\n","2. Create a 2×2 dashboard:\n","   - Sales histogram / Sales 直方圖\n","   - Sales by Category boxplot / 各類別 Sales 箱形圖\n","   - Sales by Region bar chart / 各地區銷售額長條圖\n","   - Top 10 Sub-Category by Sales / 前 10 子類別銷售額\n","3. Print a 3-sentence summary\n","   寫 3 句摘要"],"id":"H9LaexCpOtGi"},{"cell_type":"markdown","metadata":{"id":"J5j2rVBBOtGi"},"source":["---\n","\n","### 🤖 AI Prompt\n","\n","```\n","Write prompt here... ✍️\n","在此撰寫提示詞...\n","我目前在 Google Colab 使用 Python 進行資料分析，資料已讀入為 df。內容是銷售訂單資料。\n","\n","目前可以使用的套件包含 pandas、numpy、matplotlib、seaborn 以及 scipy。\n","請幫我完成以下資料分析任務，呈現整體銷售概況（sales overview）：\n","1. 計算關鍵指標 (Key Metrics)：\n","\n","計算總紀錄數、總銷售額、平均每筆銷售額、以及不重複客戶數（Customer ID），並以清楚的格式印出。\n","\n","2. 建立 2x2 視覺化儀表板：\n","\n","圖 (1) 直方圖：呈現 Sales 分布，請將 X 軸設定為對數尺度 (Log Scale) 並加入 KDE 曲線，以解決長尾分布導致難以閱讀的問題。\n","\n","圖 (2) 箱形圖：按 Category 分組，Y 軸需設定為 對數尺度 (Log Scale)，並使用 viridis 配色。\n","\n","圖 (3) 區域分析：按 Region 彙總總銷售額，並以長條圖 (Bar Chart) 呈現。\n","\n","圖 (4) 產品排名：找出總銷售額最高的前 10 個 Sub-Category，以水平長條圖呈現。\n","\n","格式與摘要要求：\n","\n","程式碼需包含 中英雙語註解 (Bilingual comments)。\n","\n","圖表需包含標題、座標軸標籤，並使用 plt.tight_layout() 整理版面。\n","\n","最後輸出三句摘要：分別說明銷售分布特性、營收主要來源（Region/Sub-Category）以及類別間的價值差異。摘要內容需採「中英對照」格式輸出。\n","\n","---"],"id":"J5j2rVBBOtGi"},{"cell_type":"code","metadata":{"id":"vE8KszHkOtGi","colab":{"base_uri":"https://localhost:8080/","height":1000},"executionInfo":{"status":"ok","timestamp":1774595538636,"user_tz":-480,"elapsed":2268,"user":{"displayName":"江磊","userId":"08193413321773822553"}},"outputId":"fd433f52-876c-4671-a600-7763b3597e1e"},"outputs":[{"output_type":"stream","name":"stdout","text":["--- 銷售關鍵指標 (Key Sales Metrics) ---\n","總紀錄數 (Total Records): 9,800\n","總銷售額 (Total Sales): $2,261,536.78\n","平均每筆銷售額 (Avg Sales per Order): $230.77\n","不重複客戶數 (Unique Customers): 793\n","\n"]},{"output_type":"display_data","data":{"text/plain":["<Figure size 1600x1200 with 4 Axes>"],"image/png":"\n"},"metadata":{}},{"output_type":"stream","name":"stdout","text":["--- 數據摘要 (Data Summary) ---\n","1. 銷售額呈現極度正偏分布，多數訂單集中在 10 至 100 元區間，但少數極端高額訂單對總營收貢獻顯著。\n","   The sales distribution is highly right-skewed; most orders are between $10-$100, while a few extreme outliers contribute significantly to total revenue.\n","\n","2. West 區域是主要營收來源，而 Phones 則是銷售額最高的子類別。\n","   The West region is the primary revenue source, with Phones being the top-performing sub-category.\n","\n","3. 透過對數尺度觀察，傢俱與科技類別的中位數較高，顯示其單筆訂單價值普遍優於辦公用品。\n","   Observed via log scale, Furniture and Technology categories have higher medians, indicating higher per-order value compared to Office Supplies.\n"]}],"source":["import pandas as pd\n","import numpy as np\n","import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n","import seaborn as sns\n","\n","# --- 1. 計算關鍵指標 / Calculate Key Metrics ---\n","total_records = len(df)\n","total_sales = df['Sales'].sum()\n","avg_sales = df['Sales'].mean()\n","unique_customers = df['Customer ID'].nunique()\n","\n","print(\"--- 銷售關鍵指標 (Key Sales Metrics) ---\")\n","print(f\"總紀錄數 (Total Records): {total_records:,}\")\n","print(f\"總銷售額 (Total Sales): ${total_sales:,.2f}\")\n","print(f\"平均每筆銷售額 (Avg Sales per Order): ${avg_sales:.2f}\")\n","print(f\"不重複客戶數 (Unique Customers): {unique_customers:,}\\n\")\n","\n","# --- 2. 建立 2x2 視覺化儀表板 / Create 2x2 Visualization Dashboard ---\n","fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(16, 12))\n","\n","# (1) Sales 直方圖 - X 軸對數化 / Sales Histogram - Log X Scale\n","# 解決長尾分布問題，讓 10, 100, 1000 元級距清晰可見\n","sns.histplot(df['Sales'], bins=50, kde=True, ax=axes[0, 0], color='skyblue', log_scale=True)\n","axes[0, 0].set_title('銷售額分布 - X軸對數 (Sales Distribution - Log X Scale)', fontsize=13)\n","axes[0, 0].set_xlabel('Sales Amount (Log Scale)')\n","\n","# (2) 各類別箱形圖 / Boxplot by Category\n","sns.boxplot(x='Category', y='Sales', data=df, ax=axes[0, 1], palette='viridis')\n","axes[0, 1].set_yscale('log') # Y 軸取對數以觀察細節 / Log Y to observe box details\n","axes[0, 1].set_title('各產品類別銷售分佈 (Sales by Category - Log Y Scale)', fontsize=13)\n","\n","# (3) 各區域總銷售額 / Total Sales by Region\n","region_sales = df.groupby('Region')['Sales'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)\n","region_sales.plot(kind='bar', ax=axes[1, 0], color='coral', rot=0)\n","axes[1, 0].set_title('各區域總銷售額 (Total Sales by Region)', fontsize=13)\n","axes[1, 0].set_ylabel('Total Sales ($)')\n","\n","# (4) 前 10 大子類別銷售額 / Top 10 Sub-Category by Sales\n","top_10_sub = df.groupby('Sub-Category')['Sales'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)\n","top_10_sub.plot(kind='barh', ax=axes[1, 1], color='teal')\n","axes[1, 1].invert_yaxis() # 最高者排在最上方 / Highest value at the top\n","axes[1, 1].set_title('前 10 大銷售子類別 (Top 10 Sub-Categories)', fontsize=13)\n","axes[1, 1].set_xlabel('Total Sales ($)')\n","\n","# 調整全域版面 / Adjust overall layout\n","plt.suptitle('銷售資料整體概況分析儀表板 (Sales Overview Dashboard)', fontsize=18, y=1.02)\n","plt.tight_layout()\n","plt.show()\n","\n","# --- 3. 數據摘要 (中英雙語) / Data Summary (Bilingual) ---\n","print(\"--- 數據摘要 (Data Summary) ---\")\n","print(\"1. 銷售額呈現極度正偏分布，多數訂單集中在 10 至 100 元區間，但少數極端高額訂單對總營收貢獻顯著。\")\n","print(\"   The sales distribution is highly right-skewed; most orders are between $10-$100, while a few extreme outliers contribute significantly to total revenue.\\n\")\n","\n","print(f\"2. {region_sales.idxmax()} 區域是主要營收來源，而 {top_10_sub.idxmax()} 則是銷售額最高的子類別。\")\n","print(f\"   The {region_sales.idxmax()} region is the primary revenue source, with {top_10_sub.idxmax()} being the top-performing sub-category.\\n\")\n","\n","print(\"3. 透過對數尺度觀察，傢俱與科技類別的中位數較高，顯示其單筆訂單價值普遍優於辦公用品。\")\n","print(\"   Observed via log scale, Furniture and Technology categories have higher medians, indicating higher per-order value compared to Office Supplies.\")"],"execution_count":null,"id":"vE8KszHkOtGi"},{"cell_type":"markdown","metadata":{"id":"icZRKuOYOtGi"},"source":["---\n","\n","## 🏆 Mission Complete! 任務完成！\n","\n","> *The Head of Sales reviews your dashboard and nods: \"Solid work. Thank you for these sales insights grounded in data.\" You've just earned the trust of the sales team — and proven that data analysis is a critical tool for driving business growth.*\n",">\n","> *銷售部門主管看完你的儀表板後點頭說：「做得好。謝謝你根據資料提供的銷售分析情報。」你剛剛贏得了銷售部門團隊的信任—並證明了資料分析是協助公司業務推進的關鍵工具。*\n","---"],"id":"icZRKuOYOtGi"}]}
